ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the experiment (e.g., COMPLETE, RUNNING) */,
  "value" REAL /* Evaluation metric value (e.g., accuracy) */,
  "embedding_dim" INTEGER /* Embedding dimension of the model */,
  "scoring_fct_norm" INTEGER /* Scoring function normalization */,
  "lr" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size */,
  "label_smoothing" REAL /* Label smoothing factor */,
  "adjusted_mean_rank" REAL /* Adjusted mean rank */,
  "hits_at_1" REAL /* Hits at 1 */,
  "hits_at_10" REAL /* Hits at 10 */,
  "hits_at_3" REAL /* Hits at 3 */,
  "hits_at_5" REAL /* Hits at 5 */,
  "mean_rank" REAL /* Mean rank */,
  "mean_reciprocal_rank" REAL /* Mean reciprocal rank */,
  "random_seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for experiment */,
  "stopped_epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch at which the experiment was stopped */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the experiment was last modified */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last modified */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., neural network, SVM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Securely stored password for user authentication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the hyperparameter */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the hyperparameter */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the hyperparameter was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the performance metric */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the performance metric */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last modified */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., report, script) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_documents_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
